pages.text:
REPÚBLICA DEMOCRÁTICA DE TIMOR-LESTE

INSTRUMENT OF ACCESSION

WHEREAS the Convention Relating to International Exhibitions was done at Paris on 22 November 1928;

WHEREAS the Convention was amended and supplement by the Protocol of 30

November 1972, the Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988;

AND WHEREAS Article 3 of the said Protocol provides that the Protocol shall remain open for accession by Goverments Parties to the 1928 Convention after 29 November 1973;

NOW THEREFORE, the Government of the Democratic Republic of Timor-Leste, hereby accedes to the 1922 Convention and the 1972 Protocol, including the

Amendments of 24 June 1982 and 31 May 1988, and undertakes faithfully to fulfill and carry out all the provisions therein contained.

IN WITNESS

WHEREOF,

1, Zacarias Albano da Costa, Minister of Foreign

Affairs of the Democratic Republic of Timor-Leste, have signed this Instrument of

Accession and caused the Seal of the Minister of Foreign Affairs of the Democratic

Republic of Timor-Leste to be hereunto affixed.

Done at Dili on the seventh day of November in the year of two thousand and seven.

Zacarias Albano da Costa

Minister of Foreign Affairs
